news.title: Jyske Bank (CPSE:JYSK) Valuation Check After Strong 1 Year Return And Recent Pullback
news.summary: How Jyske Bank stock has been performing Jyske Bank (CPSE:JYSK) has drawn investor attention after a solid 1 year total return of 53.6%, set against a recent pullback, with the stock down 3.2% over the past month and 8.9% in the past 3 months.
